scripts.dev:api: PYTHONPATH=apps/api/src uv run --project apps/api python -m uvicorn hcs_api.main:app --reload --reload-dir apps/api/src --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000
scripts.test:api: PYTHONPATH=apps/api/src uv run --project apps/api python -m pytest apps/api/tests
scripts.test: npm run test:api && npm run build:web && npm run test:web-state
